bedrockminer.config.approach.comment:
Bedrock Breaking mode.

§aVanilla Fast§r: works on vanilla, fast, but can only break bedrock from up to down,
or from down to up.
§aVanilla All Direction§r: works on vanilla, can bread bedrock from all
direction, but speed is limited by server's syncing
player's yRot and yHeadRot speed.
§aCarpet Accurate§r: for server installed Carpet Extra and
with accurateBlockPlacement enabled, you can use this
mode to break bedrock from all directions very fast
bedrockminer.config.blockListMode.commen: Mode for block list filtering: blocklist blocks specified, allowlist allows only specified
bedrockminer.config.blockList.comment: List of blocks to block/allow based on mode (e.g. minecraft:stone)
bedrockminer.config.allowList.comment: Additional blocks to always allow (appended to server list when on server)
bedrockminer.message.cannot_find_approac: Cannot find a valid approach for %s!
bedrockminer.message.need_efficiency: Cannot instantly mine piston! Need Efficiency V pickaxe + Haste II
